陈夏意外获得了系统，由此开启了他充满未知的随机美食摆摊之旅。在公园，他售卖爽口的凉菜；在写字楼下，他呈上美味的炒饭；在学校门口，他烤制香气四溢的烤面筋。凡是品尝过他精心制作的美食的人们，无一不赞不绝口。然而，陈夏每周都会变换摆摊地点，推出各式各样不同的美食。这可苦了那些为了品尝美食的食客们，他们开始在全国各地疯狂地寻觅陈夏的身影。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7799cbc409e437e74bcabc8b0d252262~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"世界huang易","author_id":"","book_id":"7440877583555644478","book_name":"随机美食摆摊食客我吃疯狂","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1351人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7440896629839757886","read_count":"1351","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"458526"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"228","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,美食,无女主,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o7799cbc409e437e74bcabc8b0d252262~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382481&x-signature=DDDYQVneoHiZuKPK2S88JXdbTZE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4497480407061267","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"353"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230054410E29D3B6B92
